scripts.docker:build: pnpm run setup:services && pnpm run copy:env && tsx ./docker-compose.ts pull
scripts.docker:start: pnpm run copy:env && tsx ./docker-compose.ts up -d --force-recreate && pnpm run start:services
scripts.docker:stop: pnpm run copy:env && tsx ./docker-compose.ts stop && pnpm run stop:services
scripts.docker:reset: pnpm run copy:env && tsx ./docker-compose.ts down --rmi all -v --remove-orphans && pnpm run stop:services && rimraf ./.env
